mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relic_image_relation (relic_id, image_id, relation_type, is_main, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{relicId}, #{imageId}, #{relationType}, #{isMain}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM relic_image_relation WHERE relic_id = #{relicId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.relic_id, r.image_id, r.relation_type, r.is_main, r.sort_order, r.create_time, r.update_time, i.id AS 'image.id', i.image_name AS 'image.imageName', i.file_name AS 'image.fileName', i.file_path AS 'image.filePath', i.file_size AS 'image.fileSize', i.width AS 'image.width', i.height AS 'image.height', i.file_type AS 'image.fileType' FROM relic_image_relation r LEFT JOIN image_library i ON r.image_id = i.id WHERE r.relic_id = #{relicId} ORDER BY r.is_main DESC, r.sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM relic_image_relation WHERE image_id = #{imageId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, i.image_name, i.file_path, i.file_size, i.width, i.height, i.file_type FROM relic_image_relation r LEFT JOIN image_library i ON r.image_id = i.id WHERE r.relic_id = #{relicId} AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY r.is_main DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO relic_image_relation (relic_id, image_id, relation_type, is_main, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.relicId}, #{item.imageId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isMain}, #{item.sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM relic_image_relation WHERE relic_id = #{relicId} AND image_id = #{imageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE relic_image_relation SET image_id = #{imageId}, relation_type = #{relationType}, is_main = #{isMain}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM relic_image_relation ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cultural_relic r WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM relic_image_relation ri WHERE ri.relic_id = r.id)
